case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY $25.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
